text: I asked to have access to my mri images and they said the file is too big?🤔🙃 I have to do a SAR just to see my own results 😳
was told there were no pictures taken and still waiting for my missing histopathology results which were never sent to gp or myself
yeah you can get them, after you submit a SAR!
I have my pics from surgery
I wish I saw this sooner 💔
Surgeons love giving things that could be later used against them in court.
mine did'nt save properly... i have 1 photo, i had multiple spots of endo and lesions...
My last surgery there were no pictures taken!
I asked for this. They didn’t follow through. I was so dissapointed.
So even on nhs I can request they take photos? What about biopsies?
